query: SELECT fs.plotArea, fs.gfaResidential, fs.gfaRetail, fs.gfaOffices, fs.estimatedBua, fs.landPrice, fs.constructionCostPerSqft, fs.residentialSalePrice, fs.retailSalePrice, fs.officesSalePrice, fs.community, fs.saleableResidentialPct FROM feasibilityStudies fs WHERE fs.projectId = 3 LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute 
SELECT fs.plotArea, fs.gfaResidential, fs.gfaRetail, fs.gfaOffices, fs.estimatedBua, fs.landPrice, fs.constructionCostPerSqft, fs.residentialSalePrice, fs.retailSalePrice, fs.officesSalePrice, fs.community, fs.saleableResidentialPct FROM feasibilityStudies fs WHERE fs.projectId = 3 LIMIT 1;
stdout:
